text_block_list.name: Droite Committee Head
text_block_list.text:
Looks like it's unanimous! This year's Droite theme is "Giving You a 
Blessed Bouquet"! This calls for a round of applause!

text_block_list.name: Droite Committee Head
text_block_list.text:
This theme is courtesy of our very own Curren Bouquetd'or-chan! 
Do you mind explaining the feelings behind your idea one more time?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
O-Of course…! 
Er, well…

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
I studied quite a bit in preparation for working on the committee. 
…And in the process, I came to love the Ligne Droite.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
I admired the way the halls seemed to transform into another world, the 
students dressed up in elegant clothes… But what drew me in the most——

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
——were the many pairs, each facing their date, heart to heart. They 
were so lovely… Before I knew it, I found myself praying for their 
happiness from the bottom of my heart.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
But I felt that my prayer should be more than just a sentiment, and 
made into something tangible. 
And that feeling led me to this theme.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
A "blessing" can be a celebration of the joys they have 
experienced, or a prayer for the joys yet to come.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Blessings can come from us to those on the dance floor, 
or from the dates to one another.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to see a Ligne Droite where each and every blessing is 
given form in a bouquet, passed from one hand to another.

text_block_list.name: Droite Committee Head
text_block_list.text:
Mmhm! This really is a great theme! 
Bouquets are the best! I can't wait to deck those halls with 
flowers!

text_block_list.name: Droite Committee Head
text_block_list.text:
Now let's get down to business! We have our theme locked 
down, so next we'll assign roles! 
First off——

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oho! You want me and Flight-san to do an exhibition dance, 
I see! Very well! You can leave that to us!!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Are—— are you sure? 
D-Don't you need more time to consider? 
What about you, Flight-san…?

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
——Teehee. Well, if you really want us to do it, I'm on board ♪ 
Though I should ask, why did you choose us?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Because… the two of you came first.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
In the committee's discussions on who to ask, your names were 
the very first to come up.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
The moment we thought about the theme of "blessings", the 
thought of the two of you flashed into all our minds.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
That goes to show how blindingly bright you were when you won 
Best Date… The sight of you is still fresh in my memory.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
…I see. Is that so? 
Hahaha… I'm really happy to hear that.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Now that that's settled, let's not waste any more time! 
Flight-san! I'm going to get all my class representative work 
finished right away!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
We should start dance practice as soon as possible! 
In fact, let's start today!! 
Wait for me in the practice room, please! Bakushin, bakushiiiiiiin!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
(……………It's just now hitting me. 
I——)

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
(I get to dance again. 
Together with her——)

text_block_list.name: Tact's Friend
text_block_list.text:
——So like, total coincidence, but I saw the moment she handed 
her the brooch! 
Looks like Kraft's date this year is Cesario! No big surprise there!

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
No big surprise, you say? Teehee… I suppose Kraft-senpai has been 
telling her "You'd better be my date this year!" for quite some time.

text_block_list.name: Tact's Friend
text_block_list.text:
Aw man, looks like they're the big date to look out for this year! 
There wasn't a single person who could outshine them when 
they were on the Tiara circuit, after all!

text_block_list.name: Tact's Friend
text_block_list.text:
Kraft's the Irregular Double Crown Cherry Blossom Queen! 
Cesario's the Oaks Queen who sits on two countries' thrones! 
Couple up their era's top two, and they're totally invincible!

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
(Nobody could outshine them… 
…Their era's top two…)

text_block_list.name: Tact's Friend
text_block_list.text:
Hey? Earth to Tact-chan? 
Uh… somethin' wrong?

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
! 
…Oh, it's—— 
I, er——!

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
I'm ever so sorry! Something urgent has come up… 
If you'll excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Heart's Friend A
text_block_list.text:
All righty… You guys ready? We're gonna race to see who gets 
to be Heart's date! 
And I'm gonna win, you got that!?

text_block_list.name: Heart's Friend B
text_block_list.text:
No, I will. I trained like hell just for this race. 
I swear I'M going to be the one at our queen's side this year!

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: Wow! Good to see you're all so fired up♪ You're all OK if I count you off, right? Looks like you're all ready, so——

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text: ——Please, let me race too!

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text: Huff… I- I apologize for the sudden intrusion. Please, allow me… to join this race! Please!

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: Oh… goodness! What's gotten into you, Tact? Are you sure you're good to race? …You're still in your school uniform, you know.

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Huh? …Ah! Um, I can change… On second thought, no! 
I will race in my uniform! It'll be fine!

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Please… If you will, allow me join this contest. 
And once I win it——

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Daring Heart-san. 
I would like you to dance with me at this year's Ligne Droite.

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
I will earn you the title of Best Date. 
…I promise you!
